---
name: New agent support / path change
about: A new AI coding agent to support, or a changed skill-discovery path for an existing one
title: "[agent] "
labels: agent-path
assignees: ""
---

<!--
This is the most valuable kind of contribution here: skill-discovery paths
across tools change fast. Help us keep the compatibility table current.
-->

## Agent

- Name: <!-- e.g. Cursor, Windsurf, Aider ... -->
- Version: <!-- the exact version you tested -->
- OS: <!-- macOS / Linux / Windows -->

## New or changed?

- [ ] New agent (not in the table yet)
- [ ] Path changed for an existing agent

## Skill-discovery path(s)

- User-level dir: <!-- e.g. ~/.cursor/rules/ -->
- Repo-level dir (travels with Git): <!-- e.g. .cursor/rules/ or .agents/skills/ -->

## Invocation syntax

How do you actually trigger the skill in this agent?
<!-- e.g. mention by name / `$skill-name` / `/skills` / auto-injected rules -->

## How did you verify it?

<!--
Please describe how you confirmed the agent actually reads from this path
(e.g. dropped a SKILL.md there, asked the agent, it responded correctly).
This is required — paths asserted without verification can't be merged.
-->

## Source / reference

<!-- Link to the tool's official docs or release notes, if any. -->
